Prompt Studio Suite

Prompt Studio

Choose a studio to get started.

Choose your studio

Paid Traffic Built for advertisers, agencies, and founders spending money on ads. Pick a job, answer a few fields, and copy out a finished prompt that plans budgets, writes ads, and diagnoses accounts in ChatGPT, Claude, or any assistant. Open studio → Coaching & Consulting Built for coaches, consultants, and advisors who need sharper offers, better client sessions, and recommendations people can act on. Pick a job, add the facts, and copy the finished prompt into the assistant you use. Open studio → Content Creator Built for YouTubers, podcasters, newsletter writers, and short-form creators who publish on a schedule. Fill in your channel once, pick a workflow, and copy a finished prompt that plans, scripts, and repairs your content with your audience already loaded in. Open studio → Course Builder For educators, trainers, and experts turning what they know into courses students finish. Each workflow builds a ready-to-paste prompt for validating demand, designing curriculum, keeping students moving, and filling the next cohort. Open studio → Ecommerce For store owners, ecommerce marketers, and the agencies who run their accounts. Pick a workflow, answer a few store-specific questions, and copy a finished prompt that produces product pages, cart recovery flows, and offer plans built on your numbers. Open studio → Email Marketing Built for owners and marketers who need emails with a clear job. Plan the campaign, write the message, diagnose the numbers, and save the prompts your team will use again. Open studio → Launch Campaign Built for founders, creators, and marketers coordinating a real launch. Turn the offer, dates, proof, and channels into campaign decisions, copy briefs, and a launch manual your team can run. Open studio → Membership & Community Built for membership owners and community builders, paid or free. Every workflow turns your answers into a finished prompt that produces onboarding flows, discussion calendars, renewal emails, and churn diagnoses you can use the same day. Open studio → Offer & Sales Page For owners, marketers, and copywriters turning an offer into a page that sells it. Every workflow builds a prompt that produces sales copy, page structure, or a fix list you can use the same day. Open studio → Social Media For marketers, creators, and owner-run brands that post every week. Fill in your business once, pick a workflow, and copy a finished prompt that produces a usable post, script, or plan the same day. Open studio →
